content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty IT collapsing -4.6% on HCLTECH's disastrous FY27 guidance and Infosys results tomorrow creates sector contagion risk. However, strong rotation is underway into FMCG (Nestle Q4 blowout), PSU Banks (MAHABANK record), Power (heatwave theme) and Financials — which is benefiting our book. VIX at 18.11 (+3.3%) signals elevated uncertainty; stick to positions with clear catalysts and manage risk tightly given all 7 holdings entered same day with no stops.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24350,
      "nifty_resistance": 24550
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 77.50,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit if target Rs 88 not hit in 10 trading days; tighten SL to cost once Rs 85 tags.",
      "reasoning": "Position is slightly negative but thesis strongly intact: Q4 PAT +35%, GNPA 1.45%, broker upgrades (HDFC Sec Rs 90, Systematix Rs 88). Stock consolidating above Rs 81 VWAP after +15% run. Setting SL below yesterday's pivot/prior swing at Rs 77.50 (~4.9% risk) and target Rs 88 aligns with analyst consensus. R:R ~1.6:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 955.00,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit if target Rs 1100 not hit in 10 days; trail SL to Rs 985 (breakeven+) if price closes above Rs 1030.",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +19% YoY, GNPA sub-1%, AUM crossed Rs 90,000 cr. Stock gapped up on catalyst and holding above Rs 988 VWAP. SL at Rs 955 (below today's low Rs 978 with buffer, ~2.9% risk from entry). Target Rs 1100 approaches MOFSL TP Rs 1143 / JPM Rs 1000. R:R ~4:1 vs entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.00,
      "new_target": 135.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "time_exit_plan": "Hold as defensive hedge; exit if SL hit or at Rs 135. Re-evaluate on Iran ceasefire binary.",
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; gold consolidating after Akshaya Tritiya profit-booking. VIX rising and Fed-rate-cut backdrop supports holding. SL Rs 121 (~3.3% risk) below 20-DMA. Target Rs 135 is conservative interim level below 52W high Rs 148."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1590.00,
      "new_target": 1780.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit before Q4 board meet in early-May if approaching target; otherwise reassess after results.",
      "reasoning": "Power sector strength + Nabha Power acquisition closure (+28% capacity). Stock just cleared 52W high (Rs 1640) with 2.3x volume; new breakout. SL Rs 1590 below prior resistance-turned-support and today's pivot (~3.8% risk). Target Rs 1780 projects measured move. R:R ~2:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1360.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit at Rs 1500 or if SL hit. Trail SL to Rs 1410 breakeven if price closes above Rs 1450.",
      "reasoning": "Q4 blowout: revenue +22.6%, EBITDA margin 26.3%, PAT +27.2% — strongest FMCG print in a decade. Stock hit 52W high on results. Small drawdown from highs is healthy consolidation above Rs 1400 VWAP. SL Rs 1360 (~3.5% risk) below today's low Rs 1386 with buffer. Target Rs 1500 = psychological + measured move. R:R 1.9:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1010.00,
      "new_target": 1130.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "time_exit_plan": "Q4 results April 25 is binary event — reduce or exit before results if risk feels elevated; otherwise hold to target.",
      "reasoning": "Provisional update strong: advances +25%, deposits +23%. Universal bank moat reinforced by Ujjivan rejection. Stock at 52W high Rs 1054 today. SL Rs 1010 below breakout pivot (~3.8% risk). Target Rs 1130 = ~7.6% upside. Q4 results Apr 25 is the near-term binary — tight risk management warranted."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 655.00,
      "new_target": 720.00,
      "confidence": 0.58,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "time_exit_plan": "Q4 results April 29 — plan to exit before results regardless of price given USFDA warning letter overhang.",
      "reasoning": "Near 52W high Rs 685 with 3.7x volume; pharma defensive bid is real. However, USFDA warning letter on largest API plant is a structural overhang. Tightening risk: SL Rs 655 (~3.8% risk) below VWAP/SMA20. Target Rs 720 modest. Lower conviction; keep exit discipline before Apr 29 results binary."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 125,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 404.50,
      "stop_loss": 388.00,
      "target": 430.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit if target Rs 430 not hit in 12 trading days; trail SL to breakeven if price closes above Rs 415.",
      "reasoning": "NTPC just broke out of 52W high Rs 400.85 with power-sector tailwind (heatwave, peak demand 275-285 GW). Cheapest valuation among large-cap power (P/E 14.44) vs Tata/Adani Power stretched. Domestic revenue shields from tariff overhang. SL Rs 388 below breakout base (~4.1% risk). Target Rs 430 = analyst upper-band / ~6.3% upside. Position ~Rs 50,600 = 5% of capital. R:R 1.5:1. Adds to power sector exposure (with TORNTPOWER ~6% = ~11% total, well under 35% cap)."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 77.50,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 thesis; trail SL below support if stock extends."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 955.00,
      "reasoning": "Post-earnings breakout holding; give room to run toward Rs 1100."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; macro risk rising with VIX and Iran binary."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1590.00,
      "reasoning": "Fresh 52W high breakout with volume; let momentum play out."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1360.00,
      "reasoning": "Best FMCG Q4 print in a decade; core defensive compounder."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1010.00,
      "reasoning": "Strong business update; Q4 April 25 is binary — tight SL warranted."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 655.00,
      "reasoning": "Overhang from USFDA warning; exit before April 29 results."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "HINDUNILVR (+6.54%) and TATACONSUM (+6.29%) riding Nestle read-across but both have Q4 prints pending (HUL Apr 30) — prefer waiting for confirmation rather than chasing. ADANIPOWER at ATH with shooting star candle today + ASM list = avoid; NTPC is the cleaner power trade. DEEPAKNTR and ELECON look extended after +12% moves; await retracement to SMA20. GAIL has bearish fundamentals (Q3 PAT -57%, Kotak Sell, project delays) despite today's rally — avoid. HCLTECH in post-earnings capitulation but 1-4% FY27 guidance is structurally weak; falling knife, skip.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 44%, cash 56% — within limits. After adding NTPC (~5%), deployment rises to ~49%. Current sector exposure after NTPC: Banking/Financial (MAHABANK+PNBHOUSING+AUBANK) ~21%, Power (TORNTPOWER+NTPC) ~11%, FMCG (NESTLEIND) ~5%, Pharma (GRANULES) ~5%, ETF Gold ~5% — well diversified. Critical observation: all 7 holdings were entered without SLs/targets — today's priority is establishing discipline by setting all of them via MODIFY. IT sector carnage (-4.6%) reinforces rotation-into-defensives thesis. Will reassess AUBANK and GRANULES before their respective April 25/29 results; likely book partial or tighten SLs sharply as results approach."
}
